  "findings": [
    "No ladder or safe means of egress within 25 feet of lateral travel in a trench excavation."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work in the trench immediately.",
    "Install a compliant ladder or ramp within the 25-foot lateral travel limit before allowing workers to re-enter."
  ],
  "rationale": "OSHA 1926 Subpart P requires a structural ramp, stairway, ladder, or other safe means of egress in trench excavations that are 4 feet or more in depth, positioned so as to require no more than 25 feet of lateral travel for employees.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1926.651(c)(2)"
  ]
}
